author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Burn analysis complete. Key findings: CubeCL is the killer feature (write kernels once, run on CUDA/ROCm/Metal/Vulkan/WebGPU). Operation fusion gives 2-5x GPU perf. Training loop abstractions (Learner, Metrics) make it usable. We already have derive(Module), SafeTensors, and PyTorch import. Biggest gaps: CubeCL adoption, fusion, AMD GPU, training crate, quantization, RoPE/SwiGLU for LLMs.
